utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, the following appeared: destination (provided), travel_dates (provided), transportation (airline and flight numbers provided but no costs), accommodation (hotel name and reservation code provided but no costs), total_budget (a single amount provided but not a breakdown). Activities are missing entirely, additional_services are missing entirely. Checking for full specification: transportation requires flight details with costs — costs are missing, so not fully specified. Accommodation requires hotel selection with costs — costs are missing, so not fully specified. Total_budget requires a complete cost breakdown — only a single total is given, not a breakdown, so not fully specified. Destination and travel_dates are fully specified. Therefore, 2 out of 7 items are fully specified.
